name: Chipotle Polenta
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water and salt to a boil in a heavy saucepan over medium-high heat.
2. Slowly pour in the polenta while stirring constantly until fully incorporated.
3. Add minced garlic and continue cooking, stirring frequently, until the polenta pulls away from the pan sides.
4. Reconstitute sun-dried tomatoes and chipotle chiles with boiling water; set aside.
5. Once the polenta is cooked through, drain any excess liquid.
6. Mince the softened sun-dried tomatoes and chipotle chile, then add to the polenta.
7. Transfer the mixture to a marble pastry board or cookie sheet.
8. Spread the polenta into a rectangle about 1/4-inch thick.
9. Let cool completely.
10. Cut into desired shapes using cookie cutters.
11. Place the shaped polenta on a lightly sprayed cookie sheet.
12. Broil for 5 minutes, then serve immediately.
Total Calories Per Serving: 95; Fat: 1 gram
